solution.p: First we square each side to obtain a quadratic equation. Then we can rearrange that into standard form.
Now we can identify a={1}\text{,} b={-20}\text{,} and c={64}\text{,} and apply the quadratic formula.
The only possible solutions are 4 and 16\text{.} But if we check the original equation, we find that neither of them actually work. So there are no solutions.
